title: ‘Nobody expected them to like it’: DG Comp chief on battling Big Tech
summary_full: "They’re entitled not to like [the DMA] – what they are not entitled to do is not comply with it," new-in-post DG Anthony Whelan tells Euractiv
summary_public: "They’re entitled not to like [the DMA] – what they are not entitled to do is not comply with it," new-in-post DG Anthony Whelan tells Euractiv
